rag_rules: Use initialized temporal recurrence for stateful equations and nested if-then-else for branching logic
Place input envelope assumptions and output range guarantees in annex agree only when concrete bounds or visible relations are provided
generic_rules: Generated AGREE contracts must use logical operators and implication syntax
Ensure type consistency between helper declarations and expressions
Define bounded outputs with clamping logic and corresponding guarantees
syntax_or_pattern_reminders: Use `-> pre(t) + step` for temporal recurrence in stateful equations
Use nested `if ... then ... else` for conditional logic
anti_patterns: Avoid mismatched types between helper declarations and expression results
Do not place assumptions or guarantees without concrete bounds or visible relations
